results.rendered_html:
ā-√bādh Ā. -bādhate, to oppress, press on, press hard;
to molest, check;
to pain or torment,  TS.  &c.;
to suspend, annul,  BhP.

results.rendered_html:
ābādh 1 A.
1 To check, rein in, restrain.
2 To interrupt, obstruct.
3 To annoy, harass, attack, molest, injure.
4 To set forth or declare wrongly.
